info.name: Hermes API
info.description:
Government Job Vacancy Portal — Backend API

Base URL: http://localhost:8000/api/v1

All list endpoints return: { "data": [...], "pagination": { "limit", "offset", "total", "has_more" } }

Auth:
- User endpoints use {{user_token}} (Firebase → JWT via /auth/verify-token)
- Admin endpoints use {{admin_token}} (local bcrypt via /auth/admin/login)

Variables pre-set:
- base_url: http://localhost:8000/api/v1
- admin_email: admin@example.com
- admin_password: AdminPass123!

Set after calling the relevant login/create endpoints:
- user_token, admin_token, job_id, exam_id, user_id, notification_id, admit_card_id, answer_key_id, result_id

request.description: No auth required. Used by Docker healthcheck and monitoring.

Verify Firebase ID token → upsert user → return internal JWT pair.

Lookup order: firebase_uid → email → create new user.
Sets {{user_token}} collection variable on success.

Rate limited: 10/minute.
Blocklists the access token JTI in Redis. Optionally also blocklists the refresh token. Returns 204 No Content.
Rotate user JWT token pair. Old refresh token is blocklisted. Returns new access + refresh tokens.
Check which Firebase authentication providers (google, password) a user has set up. Returns whether user can add a password.
Check if a phone number is already registered and verified. Returns available/registered status.

Generate a 6-digit OTP, store in Redis with full_name (5 min TTL), and email it. Requires MAIL_ENABLED=true.

Rate limited: 3/minute.

Verify the 6-digit OTP. Returns a short-lived verification_token (JWT, 5 min TTL) for use in /complete-registration.

Rate limited: 5/minute.

Create Firebase user server-side after email OTP verification. Returns a Firebase custom token for client-side sign-in.

Password requirements: min 8 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 special char.

Rate limited: 5/minute.
Add a password to an existing Google OAuth account. Requires an email OTP verification_token. Returns Firebase custom token.

Authenticate admin/operator with local bcrypt credentials. Sets {{admin_token}} collection variable on success.

Rate limited: 5/minute.
Blocklist admin access token JTI in Redis. Optionally also blocklist the refresh token. Logs to admin_logs table.
Rotate admin JWT token pair. Old refresh token is blocklisted. Logs to admin_logs table.
Get own user profile including profile preferences. Does not include fcm_tokens.

Update user profile fields. All fields are optional (partial update).

qualification levels: 10th, 12th, diploma, graduate, postgraduate, phd
category: General, OBC, SC, ST, EWS, EBC
gender: Male, Female, Other
Update phone number. Marks phone as unverified. Sends confirmation email if MAIL_ENABLED=true.
Verify phone number with OTP. Sets is_phone_verified=true on success. Sends confirmation email.
Set password for a Google OAuth user who hasn't set one. Sends password_set confirmation email.

Change password. Requires current password verification. Sends password_changed confirmation email.

Rate limited: 5/minute.
Link email+password to a phone-only Firebase account. Requires email OTP verification first. Sends email_linked confirmation.
Send OTP to user's registered phone number for verification. Requires phone to be set on profile first. Rate limited: 3/minute.
Register a device FCM token for push notifications. Max 10 tokens per user. Uses device_fingerprint to deduplicate push delivery across multiple logins on the same device.
Unregister a device FCM token. Call on logout.

Update notification channel preferences. All fields optional.

To enable Telegram: set telegram_chat_id (user must have started the bot first).
WhatsApp: placeholder, not yet active.

item.name: Watch (Deadline Reminders)
item.description: Watch/unwatch specific jobs or entrance exams to receive automatic deadline reminders (T-7, T-3, T-1 days) and update notifications — WITHOUT formally applying. No application record is created. Max 100 watched items per user.

request.description: Watch a job to receive deadline reminders (T-7, T-3, T-1) and update notifications. Idempotent — returns 200 if already watching. Max 100 watched items per user.
Stop watching a job. Returns 404 if not currently watching.
Watch an entrance exam to receive deadline reminders and update notifications. Idempotent.
Stop watching an entrance exam. Returns 404 if not currently watching.
List all watched jobs and entrance exams. Returns { jobs: [...], exams: [...], total: n }.
List active jobs. Supports full-text search (PostgreSQL tsvector) and multiple filters. Default status=active.

Personalized job recommendations scored by user profile.

Scoring: category eligibility (+4), state match (+3), preferred categories (+2), education (+2), age range (+2), recency <7d (+1).

Fallback: newest-first if user has no preferences.
Get job detail by UUID. Increments view count on each call. Includes related admit cards, answer keys, and results.
List all admit cards across jobs and entrance exams.
Get a single admit card by UUID.
List all answer keys across jobs and entrance exams.
Get a single answer key by UUID.
List all results across jobs and entrance exams.
Get a single result by UUID.
List active entrance exams with optional filters.
Personalized entrance exam recommendations scored by user profile (category, state, education, age, recency).
Get entrance exam detail by UUID. Increments view count.

query.description: deadline_reminder_7d | deadline_reminder_3d | deadline_reminder_1d | new_job_from_followed_org | priority_job_update | welcome

request.description: List user's notifications. Filterable by type and read status.
Get count of unread notifications. Returns { "count": N }.
Mark a single notification as read. Sets is_read=true and read_at=now.
Mark all unread notifications as read for the current user.
Delete a notification. Returns 204 No Content.
List job vacancies (latest_job type). Requires Operator+ role.

body.raw:
{
  "job_title": "SSC CGL 2026",
  "organization": "Staff Selection Commission",
  "qualification_level": "graduate",
  "total_vacancies": 8000,
  "description": "Combined Graduate Level Examination 2026. Applications invited for various Group B and C posts.",

  "status": "draft",
  "source_url": "https://ssc.nic.in"
}

request.description:
Create a new job vacancy. Sets {{job_id}} on success. Returns 201.

Requires Operator+ role. If status=active, triggers new_job_notifications Celery task for org followers.
Get a single job by ID (any status). Requires Operator+ role.

Update a job. Logs changes to admin_logs. Triggers notify_priority_subscribers if job is active.

Operator restrictions: can only modify status, description, short_description, notification_date, application_start/end, exam_start/end, result_date. Admins can modify all fields.
Approve a draft job → status becomes active. Triggers send_new_job_notifications for org followers. Logs to admin_logs. Requires Operator+ role.
Soft-delete a job (status → cancelled). Hard-deleted by Celery purge task after 90 days. Requires Admin role only.

Upload a government job notification PDF. Uses pdfplumber to extract text, then Anthropic Claude to extract structured JSON (job_title, organization, dates, vacancies, salary, fees, eligibility, source_url). No DB write — returns JSON for form auto-fill.

Requires Operator+ role. Max 10MB PDF.
List all admit cards. Requires Operator+ role.

body.raw:
{
  "job_id": "{{job_id}}",
  "title": "SSC CGL 2026 Tier-I Admit Card",
  "download_url": "https://ssc.nic.in/admit-card/2026",
  "phase_number": 1,
  "valid_from": "2026-07-25",
  "valid_until": "2026-08-10",
  "notes": "Download from SSC official website"
}

request.description: Create an admit card linked to a job or entrance exam. Exactly one of job_id or exam_id must be provided (enforced by DB CHECK constraint). Sets {{admit_card_id}} on success.
Delete an admit card. Requires Admin role.
List all answer keys. Requires Operator+ role.
Create an answer key. answer_key_type: provisional | final. Sets {{answer_key_id}} on success.
Delete an answer key. Requires Admin role.
List all results. Requires Operator+ role.

body.raw:
{
  "job_id": "{{job_id}}",
  "title": "SSC CGL 2026 Tier-I Result",
  "result_type": "merit_list",
  "phase_number": 1,
  "download_url": "https://ssc.nic.in/result/2026",
  "total_qualified": 85000,
  "notes": "Candidates qualified for Tier-II"
}

request.description: Create a result. result_type: merit_list | scorecard | final_selection | cut_off. Sets {{result_id}} on success.
Delete a result. Requires Admin role.
List all entrance exams (all statuses). Requires Operator+ role.

body.raw:
{
  "exam_name": "JEE Main 2026",
  "conducting_body": "National Testing Agency",
  "counselling_body": "JoSAA",

  "application_start": "2025-11-01",

request.description: Create a new entrance exam. Sets {{exam_id}} on success. Requires Operator+ role.
Get entrance exam detail by ID (all statuses). Requires Operator+ role.
Update an entrance exam. Requires Operator+ role.
Delete an entrance exam. Requires Admin role.
List users. Supports search by name/email. Requires Operator+ role.
Get a single user with profile detail. Requires Operator+ role.
Suspend or activate a user. status: active | suspended. Requires Admin role. Logs to admin_logs.
Change an admin user's role. role: admin | operator. Requires Admin role. Logs to admin_logs.
Permanently delete a user from PostgreSQL and Firebase. Requires Admin role.

Create a new admin or operator account. Requires Admin role.

The first admin must be seeded directly in the DB. All subsequent accounts use this endpoint.

Password requirements: min 8 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 special char.

Get dashboard counts: jobs (total/active/draft/expired/cancelled), admit_cards, answer_keys, results, entrance_exams, users (total/active/new_this_week), applications.

Requires Operator+ role.

Get admin audit trail. Logs expire after 30 days. Actions include: admin_login, admin_logout, create_job, update_job, approve_job, delete_job, extract_pdf, update_user_status, update_user_role.

Requires Admin role only.
